title: Add CLI validation for combined docs review state
description: Add hermitctl validation for grouped docs-cms review state so CLI output can be compared with the menu bar dashboard state.

title: Dashboard shows zero docs-cms review documents after all repos load
description: Screenshot shows 59/59 repositories loaded but dashboard reports 0 documents waiting for review, while jrepp/merge-god#1 has docs-cms ADR/memo/RFC files labeled for review. Debug API discovery and native dashboard summary/state propagation.
close_reason: Fixed: seeded jrepp/merge-god, included labeled closed/merged PRs in docs-cms review discovery, and surfaced top-level PR state/merged metadata in the dashboard.

title: Discover all Docuchango documents in PR summaries
description: Hermit currently surfaces a single primary RFC document for review-ready pull requests. PR https://github.com/jrepp/merge-god/pull/1 contains multiple Docuchango document types (ADR, memo, RFCs) that should be surfaced for review.
close_reason: Fixed: review-ready PR discovery now surfaces all docs-cms ADR/memo/PRD/RFC documents with PR-level stats, and dashboard groups them by pull request.

title: Debug github.ibm.com disconnected state
description: Hermit is showing github.ibm.com as disconnected. Diagnose whether this is local GitHub auth, Hermit account/config state, server reachability, or native UI status handling, then fix or document the blocker.
close_reason: Fixed remaining disconnected state by refreshing dev-seeded GitHub Enterprise tokens from gh before preserving old UserDefaults tokens.

title: Improve CI coverage for settings repository workflows
description: Add CI and local test ergonomics for native repo seeding/settings registration and backend repository discovery workflows.
close_reason: CI now runs native repository config regression tests and Makefile exposes the same local target

title: Register settings-added repositories with running server
description: Repositories added through native Settings should be available to the embedded server immediately, without relying on seed config or relaunch.
close_reason: Settings-added repositories now register with the running server and native seeding preserves existing Settings repos

title: Add GitHub.com merge-god canary repository
description: Ensure native dev seeding and discovery include jrepp/merge-god from github.com so PR #1 is picked up by the dashboard.
close_reason: Native seed config now includes jrepp/merge-god and resolves GitHub.com tokens from gh auth

title: Restore Meridian repo config seeding
description: make dev currently reseeds native preferences from config/hermit.yaml and drops the configured github.ibm.com/meridian repositories stored in config/hermit-repos.meridian.json.
close_reason: make dev now seeds native preferences from the Meridian repository bundle when present.

title: Remove AppKit menu chrome from menu bubble
description: Return the Hermit menubar UX to a borderless floating speech bubble while preserving reliable icon click behavior.
close_reason: Removed the NSMenu wrapper and restored the menu UX as a borderless status-panel speech bubble.

title: Restore menu click visibility
description: Ensure clicking the Hermit menubar item reliably shows the menu UX after replacing MenuBarExtra.
close_reason: Restored click visibility by using an NSMenu-backed status item with hosted menu content.

title: Own menu bubble with borderless status panel
description: Replace MenuBarExtra window presentation with an AppKit status item and borderless panel so the Hermit bubble has stable positioning, no system chrome, and controlled opening animation.
close_reason: Replaced MenuBarExtra window with AppKit status item and borderless panel

title: Remove old standalone settings menu
description: Settings has been folded into the main menu bar view. Remove the old standalone Settings window/menu path and route remaining Settings actions into the embedded main-view settings tab.
close_reason: Removed the macOS standalone Settings scene/window manager and updated tests/docs to use the embedded Settings tab in the Hermit menu window.

title: Probe all docs-project structural config formats
description: Provider refresh should start by probing docs-project.{yaml,yml,json,toml} and load the first available structural file for Docuchango discovery instead of only checking docs-project.yaml.
close_reason: Added docs-project YAML/YML/JSON/TOML probes and parsers for Docuchango structural discovery, including subproject probing and regression coverage.

title: Fix provider refresh error settings navigation
description: The native repository detail screen shows Provider refresh failed: Not Found and its Settings action opens the old settings menu. Investigate the refresh endpoint wiring and update the error action to open the current settings flow.
close_reason: Fixed provider refresh handling for missing docs directories and updated menu error Settings actions to open the embedded Settings tab.

title: Use SQLite for local cache and provider workset
description: Embed SQLite in the Hermit server data directory for non-sensitive repository refresh metadata, document/RFC cache projections, and queued provider operations.
close_reason: Embedded SQLite workset store added under DataDir, repository RFC list cache wired through it, and docs/tests/build validated.

title: Add local refresh cache and git operation rate limiter
description: Avoid hammering GitHub/GitHub Enterprise by persisting repository refresh timestamps across app starts and routing git-provider operations through a local queue with rate limiting.
notes: User approved ADR-010 direction and requested SQLite as the storage mechanism for cache, documents, and queued operations. Do not store sensitive information.

title: Polish menu repository list spacing and alignment
description: The macOS menu bar repository list has poor alignment after adding labeled badges: repo names collapse/truncate awkwardly, badges crowd rows, and the popout spacing feels too wide. Rework row layout and popout dimensions.
close_reason: Repository rows now use a two-line layout with title/default status above summary and metrics; sidebar is wider and popout dimensions are tighter.

title: Fix markdown preview dark mode contrast
description: Markdown preview renders dark-mode text over a light/white background, making content illegible. Update preview rendering styles so foreground and background track the active appearance.
close_reason: RFC preview now passes Swift dark mode into the generated WKWebView HTML and applies explicit dark card/text/code/table/blockquote styles.

title: Clarify repository list metadata badges
description: The macOS menu bar repository list shows an Active badge and two unlabeled count badges whose meaning is unclear. Improve affordance with clearer labels/icons/tooltips while keeping row height stable.
close_reason: Repository list metadata now uses visible Default, Review, and PR labels with icons/tooltips instead of ambiguous unlabeled badges.

title: Stabilize menu repository row height during refresh
description: Repository rows in the macOS menu bar list stretch vertically during refresh. Keep row/control heights consistent across loading and loaded states.
close_reason: Menu bar repository rows now use a fixed row height with fixed-size loading/count controls, preventing vertical stretching during refresh.

title: Reconcile embedded repository store from native config
description: Embedded Hermit currently lets a stale server-side repositories.json override the repository list passed by the native app. Add a startup reconciliation path so native embedded config is authoritative and stale persisted repo entries are pruned.
close_reason: Embedded startup now replaces the server repository store from native config when programmatic repository tokens are present, with regression coverage for stale repositories.json pruning.

title: Make Hermit server authoritative for repository config
description: Implement the client/server state ownership seam: persist repository config in the Go server and make native toolbar/client flows consume server repository records rather than native UserDefaults as the source of truth.
close_reason: Server now persists repository configuration and native clients use server repository IDs from /api/v1/repositories.

title: Sync toolbar repos from runtime CLI configuration
description: Repos added through hermitctl while Hermit is running are registered in the embedded server but do not appear in the macOS toolbar if the toolbar only reads native RepositoryStore state.
close_reason: Menu bar now syncs repository list from the running Hermit API so CLI-added repos appear.

title: Debug GitHub credential helper repos
description: Build and deploy Hermit, then verify GitHub credential helper token resolution and diagnose repository failures.
close_reason: Implemented runtime repo remove/base-url support and validated CLI credential-helper workflow.

title: Debug partial PR stats across repositories
description: Hermit reports partial PR stats such as 1/60 repos in the menu dashboard. Investigate why repository PR stats are only partially loaded or displayed and fix the dashboard/store behavior.
close_reason: Preserved PR summary metadata across dashboard cache hits and counted zero-RFC successful loads as loaded.

title: Add clear CTA to review queue cards
description: Review queue and pull request summary cards currently expose the main review action only as a small external-link icon. Add an explicit CTA so users know how to act on pending reviews.
close_reason: Added explicit Review PR CTA to menu review cards.

title: Show repository last synced age in settings
description: Add a Last synced column to the native repository settings table so each repository shows how recently it synced.
close_reason: Repository settings now show persisted last synced age per repository

title: Default dashboard repositories to pending PRs
description: Set the menubar dashboard default repository filter to pending review while preserving review-count sorting.
close_reason: Dashboard repository list now defaults to pending review while preserving review-count sorting.

title: Show aggregate PR state counts on dashboard
description: Add top-level PR state summary counts to the Hermit menubar dashboard so users can see merge/check state totals across repos at a glance.
close_reason: Implemented aggregate PR state totals with loading/freshness UI

title: Make native repo seed config explicit
description: Avoid hard-coded Meridian repo seeding by exposing a Makefile variable for native repo bundle selection while preserving the default local config.
close_reason: Native repo seeding now uses an explicit HERMIT_NATIVE_REPOS_JSON override instead of a hidden hard-coded file probe.

title: Refocus menubar dashboard on primary review workflow
description: Reduce visual weight of dashboard stats and prioritize review queue/repository workflow in the Hermit menubar bubble.
close_reason: Reduced dashboard stat weight and moved the all-repo dashboard toward the review queue workflow.

title: Stabilize menu bubble positioning
description: Dynamically center the macOS menu bubble from the menu bar icon, keep the pointer aligned to the anchor, and remove visible window chrome.
close_reason: Implemented dynamic menu bubble centering, transparent chrome, and opening animation

title: Style menu view as speech bubble
description: Update the macOS Hermit menu view so the main MenuBarExtra window visually reads as a speech bubble anchored from the menu bar icon.
close_reason: Implemented compact/normal speech-bubble menu rendering and verified native build

title: Separate shareable repo config from local credentials
description: Add hermitctl support for exporting/importing native repository metadata without tokens, plus a separate local credential binding command so git credential helper access stays per developer.
close_reason: Added token-free native repo config import/export, separate local credential binding, documented workflow, and imported Meridian repo metadata locally

title: Tighten menu bar repository and RFC list views
description: The menu bar repository column currently uses large cards and the RFC list on the right only shows minimal status text. Update the repository list to be a compact summary with click-to-filter behavior for the RFCs shown on the right, and enrich RFC rows with metadata pulled from the RFC document model when available.
notes: Added repository-level summary counts to /api/v1/repositories/{id}/rfcs and updated the menu bar repo list to show pending review count and open PR count.

title: Add local repo config via hermitctl
description: Ensure hermitctl can configure repositories for local Hermit usage, not just remote server state, and use it to add all github.ibm.com/meridian repositories to the local configuration.

title: Create richer macOS repo and pending RFC surface
description: The current macOS menu bar surface is still a plain NSMenu-style repository tree. Add a dedicated SwiftUI popout view that better organizes repositories and pending RFCs, with a richer dashboard-style layout for the menu/pinned popout surface.

title: Gate local Gitea startup behind feature flag
description: Add a local feature flag for enabling Gitea-dependent dev setup, default it off for local development via .env, and make make dev skip Gitea when disabled so local builds do not depend on Docker.

title: Build and deploy Hermit locally
description: Run the local Hermit build/deploy workflow from the current branch and report whether the server/native app/iPad deploy steps complete or skip.
close_reason: Blocked before build/deploy: make dev cannot start Gitea because Docker context sockets are missing/unreachable. Docker Desktop/Rancher context points at /Users/jrepp/.docker/run/docker.sock; Podman context socket is also absent.

title: Read GitHub tokens from git credential helper
description: Allow hermitctl token configuration and rotation to use git credential helper entries for GitHub and GitHub Enterprise hosts, reducing reliance on exported PAT environment variables or .env files.
close_reason: hermitctl can now read PATs from git credential helper via --git-credential and --credential-host; used it to add jrepp/z successfully.

title: Add sync status reporting and remediation CLI
description: Expose actionable Hermit sync status through the API and hermitctl, including repository/token health, sync diagnostics, and remediation guidance for GitHub token and repository access issues.

title: Support .env token rotation in hermitctl
description: Extend hermitctl repository token configuration and rotation so operators can read PAT values from .env files, while preserving secure prompt and stdin flows.
close_reason: hermitctl can now read tokens from .env files via --env-file and --token-env for repository add, token rotation, and token read smoke checks.

title: Add Hermit CLI for token and repository management
description: Add a command-line client that targets the configured Hermit listen address and supports securely configuring Git provider tokens plus managing and debugging repository links through Hermit APIs.
close_reason: Added hermitctl for configured listen-address API access, repository management/debugging, secure token input, and token rotation support.

title: Consume Docuchango project indexes from repos
description: Update Hermit to discover Docuchango docs projects directly from a Git repository and use Docuchango project indexes, including current support for subprojects, instead of assuming a fixed docs-cms/rfcs path.
close_reason: Hermit now discovers Docuchango docs projects from repository configs, follows subprojects, and uses index targets for RFC catalog and review-ready PR discovery.

title: Build and deploy Hermit locally
description: Run the documented local development workflow, verify required services/builds, and capture any follow-up issues discovered during local deployment.
close_reason: make dev completes locally; Gitea is seeded, macOS native app builds/opens, and iPad deploy correctly skips until device IDs are configured
